case_title: COOK, JIMMY JR. VS NAKAZAWA, KATHY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COOK, JIMMY JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAKAZAWA, KATHY $2,139.11 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,299.11, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $6111.74. THE COURT DETERMINES COMPARATIVE FAULT RELATIVE TO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO BE 35%. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD WITH REGARD TO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT KATHY NAKAZAWA. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO APR-24-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-27-2006 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NAKAZAWA, KATHY

SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NAKAZAWA, KATHY
